label: Sky color set
description: A set of sky colors for one time-of-day or weather phase: sky tint, shadow tint, overlay tint, and a saturation multiplier.

sky.label: Sky
sky.description: Sky tint color as a Unity RGBA tuple.

shadow.label: Shadow
shadow.description: Shadow tint color applied to shaded map cells.

overlay.label: Overlay
overlay.description: Screen overlay tint color blended on top of the map.

saturation.label: Saturation
saturation.description: Color saturation multiplier for the map. Source config errors warn when this is zero.
